claimText: The National Biobank was launched under the Phenome India Project (PI-Check) by the Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR).
evidenceExcerpt: Launched under Phenome India Project (PI-Check) by CSIR.
examUse: Statement-based question on the implementing agency of the Phenome India Project.
distractorHooks: Launched by the Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR)
Launched by the Department of Biotechnology (DBT)
Launched under the Genome India Project

claimText: The National Biobank collects genomic, lifestyle, and clinical data to aid early diagnosis and AI-driven diagnostics.
evidenceExcerpt: Collects genomic, lifestyle, and clinical data from 10,000 individuals to aid early diagnosis and AI-driven diagnostics.
examUse: Statement-based question on the scope and objectives of the National Biobank.
distractorHooks: Collects only genomic data, excluding lifestyle or clinical data
Aims solely at cloning research rather than diagnostics

claimText: A phenome represents the entire set of phenotypes, which are observable physical characteristics, in a cell, tissue, organ, organism, or species.
evidenceExcerpt: Phenome is the entire set of phenotypes in a cell, tissue, organ, organism or species.
examUse: Definition-based question or correct-pair matching for biological terms.
distractorHooks: Phenome refers only to the genetic makeup of an organism
Phenome is restricted only to human organisms

claimText: An organism's phenotype is determined by the interaction between its genotype and environmental influences.
evidenceExcerpt: Phenotype is determined by genotype and environmental influences.
examUse: Statement-based question on genetics and environmental interaction.
distractorHooks: Phenotype is determined exclusively by genotype
Environmental factors have no impact on an organism's phenotype
